purpose: Continuation roadmap for reference ingest, skill/flow/harness contracts, research evidence briefs, media synthesis orchestration, observability, and eval datasets.

artifacts.purpose: Record how a reference clip was analyzed, including rights boundary and ingest settings.
Convert reference analysis into allowed borrowed behaviors, blocked copied elements, asset needs, and quality gates.
Record selected skill, archetype, blueprint, required assets, and quality gates for an agent request.
Expand a flow manifest into run id, output directory, inputs, expected outputs, and review gates.
Persist the standard JSON-stdio harness success or failure envelope.
Declare topic, platform, niche, queries, sources, freshness, and exclusions before evidence collection.
Normalize evidence, trending topics, searched time, sources, and collection warnings.
Hand compact cited evidence, claims, selected angle, constraints, and do-not-claim notes to script generation.
Persist typed text-to-video, image-to-video, or scene-to-video generation requests.
Record provider capability, cost, latency, policy, selected adapter, fallback, and rationale.
Persist media synthesis job lifecycle, request, result, error, retries, and cost link.
Append pipeline, stage, progress, completion, and failure events for a run.
Record provider operations, latency, units, cost, and status.
Summarize stage costs, durations, tokens, budget limit, and warnings.
Bind archetype fixtures to blueprints, recipes, cases, rubrics, expected artifacts, and failure examples.
Compare generated output against fixture artifacts, schemas, programmatic checks, rubrics, and feature snapshots.
Summarize datasets, pass rate, failures, skipped cases, cost, and status for local or PR eval runs.

gates: Reference ingest must preserve public-reference and rights boundaries.
Flow and harness execution must persist route, run id, artifacts, warnings, and errors.
Research-backed scripts must cite evidence and record do-not-claim constraints.
Generated media must have provider selection, job, ledger, and review artifacts.
Provider cost, retry, and cache behavior must be visible before publish approval.
Golden archetype datasets should fail missing artifacts before subjective rubrics.
